auth.label: API Key
auth.description: FullEnrich API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or copy it from the FullEnrich API page: https://app.fullenrich.com/app/api.

actions.name: get_credit_balance
actions.description: Get the current FullEnrich credit balance for the workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting the FullEnrich credit balance.

balance.description: The number of credits available in the workspace.

actions.name: lookup_company
actions.description: Look up one FullEnrich company by domain or professional-network identifier.

domain.description: The company domain to look up.

professional_network_url.description: The professional network URL of the company.

professional_network_id.description: The professional network ID of the company.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for looking up one FullEnrich company. Provide domain, professional_network_url, or professional_network_id.

items.description: A company profile returned by FullEnrich.

companies.description: The matching companies returned by FullEnrich.

credits.description: The number of credits consumed by the lookup.

anyOf.description: The lookup metadata returned by FullEnrich.

raw.description: A JSON object returned by FullEnrich.

actions.name: lookup_person
actions.description: Look up one FullEnrich person by professional-network identifier or name.

person_name.description: The full name of the person to look up.

person_professional_network_url.description: The professional network profile URL of the person.

person_professional_network_id.description: The professional network profile ID of the person.

company_professional_network_url.description: The professional network URL of the company used to disambiguate a person-name lookup.

company_professional_network_id.description: The professional network ID of the company used to disambiguate a person-name lookup.

company_domain.description: The domain of the company used to disambiguate a person-name lookup.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for looking up one FullEnrich person. Provide a person professional-network identifier, or person_name with a company identifier.

items.description: A person profile returned by FullEnrich.

people.description: The matching people returned by FullEnrich.

credits.description: The number of credits consumed by the lookup.

anyOf.description: The lookup metadata returned by FullEnrich.

raw.description: A JSON object returned by FullEnrich.
